overview.description: The Grayscale Ethereum Covered Call ETF (ETCO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long eth, short usd currency. The fund is actively managed, seeking current income via a synthetic covered call strategy on Ethereum ETPs through options trading. It aims to capitalize on the performance of Ethereum while providing monthly distributions to investors. ETCO was launched on Sep 4, 2025 and is issued by Grayscale.
